description: Implement a collaborative filtering recommendation engine in OrientDB's 'demodb' for 'john.smith@example.com'. Create a vertex class 'Recommendations' (properties: TargetEmail STRING, RestaurantName STRING, Score INTEGER, GeneratedDate DATE) and an edge class 'HasRecommendation'. Generate recommendations by identifying restaurants visited by individuals who stayed at the same hotels as John, excluding any restaurants John has already visited. Calculate a score based on the count of co-stayers who visited each restaurant. Insert the results into the 'Recommendations' class, link them to John's Profile with 'HasRecommendation' edges, and save the SQL query used to /home/ga/recommendation_query.sql.
